commands.command: uv run ruff check tools/check_gate0_candidate.py tools/check_delivery_governance.py libs/runtime/tests/test_gate0_candidate.py libs/runtime/tests/test_delivery_governance.py

negative_controls: missing, expired, revoked, cross-tenant, or client-supplied access identity reaches a mart query, artifact retrieval, or mutation
administrator reads private conversation or document content without separately approved break-glass evidence
grant, revocation, publication policy, or access audit row is updated or deleted instead of appended
private app rows bypass RLS or return after cross-tenant object-ID guessing
a contradictory resource privacy shape bypasses the publication policy for a materialized strategy or backtest result
an audit event and its authorization decision disagree on tenant, principal, event kind, or time, or administrator metadata exposes a private resource identifier or crosses tenants
ordinary app runtime reads administrator audit metadata or either immutable audit base table
AuthorizationService hides publication-policy, authentication-failure, or delegation-revocation inputs required by authorize_access
raw or staging access, arbitrary SQL, model-generated SQL, factor computation, Qlib invocation, or replay execution is introduced
AccessContext, tenant, principal, role, entitlement, or publication-policy metadata enters factor, BacktestDataGateway, DecisionSnapshot, ReplayEventStream, or Qlib types
a default route, release binding, scheduler, live credential, identity-provider request, or Production readiness claim is activated
the stable package root omits the exact governed-access symbols or ReleaseManifest gains an access binding
a materialized result is authorized without a matching publication rule and active entitlement grant, or a wrong-policy grant is recorded on an allow decision
an unsealed publication policy set authorizes a typed E2 resource, or a sealed policy set accepts another entitlement rule under the unchanged identity and content hash
a pre-E2 decision writer that omits the new nullable resource fields is rejected during the additive migration rollout or disappears from administrator audit metadata
a non-administrator or a policy without the explicit action authorizes a registered replay request
the frozen governance/gate0/manifest-v4.json bytes or its historical acceptance boundary are changed
the Gate 0 v5 successor drops, weakens, or marks accepted any external blocker inherited from v4
a Gate 0 v6-or-later successor accepts without loading its frozen predecessor commit and comparing immutable Git bytes
a terminal batch closes an issue or exempts accepted-evidence changes for an issue outside its capability_issues ownership
